items.title: Tomorrow, Monday, June 29, is the big deadline day around the NBA.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Tomorrow, Monday, June 29, is the big deadline day around the NBA.

All player and team options must be decided upon by tomorrow. Also the deadline for teams to issue qualifying offers to make players restricted free agents this summer.

Free agent negotiations open at 6PM ET on Tuesday, June 30!

items.title: June 28, 1992: The '92 U.S. men's Olympic basketball team takes the floor for the first time—during the preliminary round of the Tournament of the Americas, held in Portland.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 28, 1992: The '92 U.S. men's Olympic basketball team takes the floor for the first time—during the preliminary round of the Tournament of the Americas, held in Portland.

Charles Barkley scored 22 PTS and Clyde Drexler added 20 PTS as the "Dream Team" defeated Cuba, 136-57.

items.title: Only two NBA contract deadlines today, unless they are pushed back:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Only two NBA contract deadlines today, unless they are pushed back:

🏀Nets: deadline to pick up $6.25M team option for Ziaire Williams
🏀Heat: Dru Smith's contract becomes fully guranteed for $2.6M

media.title: How Ebuka Okorie made rapid rise from 3-star recruit to NBA draft pick
media.description: Even before his rapid ascent from three-star recruit to Detroit Pistons first-round pick, Ebuka Okorie was on Trajan Langdon’s radar.

items.title: Here are my simple thoughts on Jaylen Brown:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Here are my simple thoughts on Jaylen Brown:

I'm a big believer in stats/analytics, but if your model tells you that Jaylen Brown is the 7th best player on a team (and it's not Team USA), then you have a problem with your model.

Brown isn't a perfect player, but we all know he's an awesome one.

items.title: Our body wash is formulated with GARBOLIN
items.author: Seth Rosenthal
items.body_excerpt:
Our body wash is formulated with GARBOLIN

ok

Other bodywashes contain VARNIM

oh no

Our bodywash is VARNIM-FREE

thank god

It contains 100 PERCENT JURBINI OIL

fantastic 

No JURBINI OIL IS BAD

oh no

Just kidding JURBINI OIL IS HEALING

phew

items.title: Hollander POTD Bobby Hurley. Legendary Duke PG was drafted 7th by SAC in 93. After 19 gms, seriously injured in a car accident. Teammate Mike Peplowski saw the accident & saved his life. Hurley came back in 94-95 but had lost speed. Lasted in NBA til 98 & coached til recently.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Bobby Hurley. Legendary Duke PG was drafted 7th by SAC in 93. After 19 gms, seriously injured in a car accident. Teammate Mike Peplowski saw the accident & saved his life. Hurley came back in 94-95 but had lost speed. Lasted in NBA til 98 & coached til recently.

items.title: The Los Angeles Lakers have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Chris Manon, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Los Angeles Lakers have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Chris Manon, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Manon will now be a restricted free agent this summer.

items.title: The Minnesota Timberwolves have tendered a qualifying offer to Jaylen Clark and a two-way qualifying offer to Enrique Freeman, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Minnesota Timberwolves have tendered a qualifying offer to Jaylen Clark and a two-way qualifying offer to Enrique Freeman, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Clark and Freeman will now be restricted free agents this offseason. Clark has reportedly agreed to a new deal already.
